header.location: Pittsburgh, PA (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People & Organization Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in insights, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact—always seeking to improve people experience through human-centered, systematic approaches.

items.text: Assist with {coord|onboarding, performance cycles, engagement programs}, and data updates
Help gather information for {cross|workforce planning} or organizational updates under guidance from senior PXBPs
Respond to {ex|employee questions} and direct them to appropriate resources
Support {ex|engagement, recognition, and inclusion} initiatives through logistics, coordination, and communications
Coordinate {coord|communications and training materials} for change initiatives led by senior PXBPs
Help monitor adoption and gather feedback from employees
Partner with {prog|Learning & Development} to schedule sessions, manage attendance, and track completion
Support career development resources by helping gather data or employee feedback
Assist in administering {coord|performance management} tools and reminders
Reinforce company values by helping prepare {ex|culture-related} content, resources, or events
Run basic reports from {tools|HRIS systems} and update dashboards as requested
{data|Maintain accuracy of people data} and support metrics tracking (turnover, engagement, headcount)
{coord|Document employee relations cases} and assist with scheduling, follow-up, and policy lookups
Escalate complex concerns to senior PXBPs or PX leadership
Partner with {cross|COEs} by sharing data, preparing materials, and ensuring consistent communication across PX teams
Support {cross|global initiatives} by coordinating deliverables and tracking status
2+ years relevant experience ✅ (~3 yrs across OD, HRBP, program mgmt)
Bachelor's degree ✅ (BA Wesleyan + MS USC)
Experience coordinating HR programs or supporting HR operations ✅
{tools|HRIS and analytics tools} ✅ (Rippling, ADP, SAP, Greenhouse)
Awareness of employment laws ⚠️ — exposure at Vestas (local labor laws), not a deep strength
